summary: The transaction-lookup pruning divergence is rustfmt-only noise: semicolons on existing returns plus range and test arithmetic line wrapping.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 264: M	crates/prune/prune/src/segments/user/transaction_lookup.rs.
The isolated patch only adds semicolons to existing no-work and inconsistent-data returns.
The transaction range expression and test arithmetic are rewrapped without changing operands or precedence.
No transaction lookup range bounding, hash-count validation, limiter, or expected last-pruned transaction behavior changed.
